notes: A traffic shift moved a region's requests onto origin-web at 13:10. origin-web CPU saturated (cpu_util_pct pegged near 99%, render_latency_ms_p99 climbing from 13:12) so renders went slow. cdn-edge fetches uncached pages from origin-web; with origin-web slow, cdn-edge origin-fetch deadlines expired and it served 502/504 to customers, paging at 13:20. cdn-edge is the LOUDEST (customer-facing 5xx alarm) but is the outer victim; origin-web saturated first. image-resizer deployed at 13:14 and emits a flat trickle of benign 415 errors (decoy). static-assets serves from cache off-origin and stays healthy (control).
_design_note: Paged on cdn-edge because that is where customer 5xx is measured. Origin-web is the deepest/slowest failing component; its CPU and render latency degrade strictly before any cdn-edge 5xx.
